title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Lido Learning

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Lido Learning
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
